offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, cash flow gaps cause late orders. We provide predictive cash flow forecasting instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Cash flow gaps due to delayed payments and unpredictable sales.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about cash flow
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Share insights in Etsy seller forums/groups
try_it: Let users try Invoice analysis and Purchase order tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
